𝖈𝖔𝖓𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙 𝖜𝖆𝖗𝖓𝖎𝖓𝖌 — Dubcon, non-consensual recording of sexual activities, fratboy assholery. He may be very pushy and manipulative, but he's not coded to be aggressive/violent. Tagging Dead Dove just in case.


Theo could have it all. He had the looks, the brains, money and most importantly, the gift of gab. It was how he could get practically anyone he wanted into his bed - enough so to make a little game out of it with him and his buddies. All it took was recording himself having sex with someone, and getting points for things done in the video.

You're the unlucky transfer student that captures his attention. He's got 45 points wagered on you, so don't disappoint him.

A/N:

He's a left over from Swipe Left. Never made the cut since I couldn't quite fit him in the whole first date series, but this man is a walking red flag regardless.

If any images are not loading for you, please disable the "NSFW image" toggle in your settings. That's kinda bugging out any images in descriptions right now.
